title: intense portuguese basil frittata
description: a spicy, pillowy portuguese frittata featuring thai holy basil, perfect for a weekend brunch
instructions: in a small skillet, heat the vegan butter over medium heat and sauté the garlic until fragrant
add the thai holy basil and red pepper flakes to the skillet and cook for 1 minute
in a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, dairy-free milk, salt, and black pepper
pour the egg mixture over the basil mixture in the skillet and cook until the edges start to set
transfer the skillet to the oven and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 15 minutes
remove the skillet from the oven and use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the frittata towards the center
return the skillet to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the frittata is cooked through
remove the skillet from the oven and let the frittata cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving
